data.name: Agb
data.value: General Terms and Conditions (GTC)

data.name: CollectionDelivery
data.value: § 12 Collection and Delivery

data.name: CollectionDelivery1
data.value: (1) Binding selection of the delivery option

data.name: CollectionDelivery10
data.value: If collection does not take place on time, we accept no liability for spoilage or loss of quality, especially in the case of perishable food products.

data.name: CollectionDelivery11
data.value: (3) Delivery by our own delivery service

data.name: CollectionDelivery12
data.value:
• Delivery service is provided exclusively within the designated delivery areas.
  • Delivery typically occurs once a week or every two weeks, depending on the delivery area.
  • Customers will be informed of the exact delivery date.
  • The customer is obligated to accept the goods personally or through an authorized recipient on the agreed-upon date.
  • If delivery cannot be completed due to reasons attributable to the customer, the customer assumes responsibility for any unaccepted deliveries.
  • We reserve the right to postpone the delivery date to another day or week for legitimate reasons.

data.name: CollectionDelivery13
data.value: (4) Shipping via post / parcel service

data.name: CollectionDelivery14
data.value:
• Shipping is to the delivery address provided by the customer.
  • Delivery time depends on the information provided in the shop.
  • For perishable food items that require refrigeration during transport, shipping is at the customer's risk, especially if continuous refrigeration cannot be guaranteed.

data.name: CollectionDelivery15
data.value: (5) Transfer of risk

data.name: CollectionDelivery16
data.value: The risk of accidental loss or damage to the goods passes to the customer:

data.name: CollectionDelivery17
data.value:
• For in-store pickup: upon handover at the store
  • For delivery service: upon handover at the delivery address
  • For postal delivery: upon handover by the parcel service

data.name: CollectionDelivery18
data.value: (6) Hygiene & Freshness

data.name: CollectionDelivery19
data.value:
• Food products are carefully packaged and, if necessary, transported under refrigeration.
  • Customers are required to store the food products properly and check their quality immediately upon receipt.

data.name: CollectionDelivery2
data.value: When placing an order, the customer selects one of the following options:

data.name: CollectionDelivery3
data.value: Collection in the store

data.name: CollectionDelivery4
data.value: Delivery by our own delivery service

data.name: CollectionDelivery5
data.value: Shipping via postal service / parcel service

data.name: CollectionDelivery6
data.value: The selected option is binding once the order has been completed. Changes after order completion are only possible after consultation with us.

data.name: CollectionDelivery7
data.value: (2) In-store pickup

data.name: CollectionDelivery8
data.value: The customer can pick up the order in the store.

data.name: CollectionDelivery9
data.value: The collection should take place within the specified time period.

data.name: ConclusionContract
data.value: § 2 Conclusion of Contract

data.name: ConclusionContract1
data.value: (1) The presentation of the products in the online shop does not constitute a legally binding offer, but rather a non-binding invitation to place an order.

data.name: ConclusionContract2
data.value: (2) By clicking the “Buy” / “Order now” button, the customer submits a binding offer to conclude a purchase agreement.

data.name: ConclusionContract3
data.value: (3) The purchase contract is concluded as soon as we accept the order by sending an order confirmation email or dispatch the goods.

data.name: DeliveryShipping
data.value: § 4 Delivery and Shipping

data.name: DeliveryShipping1
data.value: (1) Delivery will be made to the delivery address specified by the customer within Germany.

data.name: DeliveryShipping2
data.value: (2) Delivery times are indicated in the online shop and begin after receipt of payment.

data.name: DeliveryShipping3
data.value: (3) In the case of food products, the customer is obliged to accept the goods immediately at the agreed delivery time.

data.name: DeliveryShipping4
data.value: (4) If acceptance is not made or is delayed for reasons attributable to the customer, we shall not be liable for any loss of quality, in particular in the case of perishable goods.

data.name: FinalProvisions
data.value: § 11 Final Provisions

data.name: FinalProvisions1
data.value: (1) The law of the Federal Republic of Germany shall apply, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods.

data.name: FinalProvisions2
data.value: (2) Should any provision of these Terms and Conditions be invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions shall remain unaffected.

data.name: Liabilit2
data.value: (2) Any further liability is excluded.

data.name: Liability
data.value: § 9 Liability

data.name: Liability1
data.value: (1) In cases of slight negligence, we shall only be liable for breaches of essential contractual obligations (cardinal obligations) and limited to foreseeable damages.

data.name: PricesPayment
data.value: § 3 Prices and Payment Terms

data.name: PricesPayment1
data.value: (1) All prices are final prices and include statutory VAT.

data.name: PricesPayment2
data.value: (2) Any additional shipping costs will be displayed separately to the customer during the ordering process.

data.name: PricesPayment3
data.value: (3) Payment is made using the payment methods offered in the online shop

data.name: PricesPayment4
data.value: (4) The purchase price is due immediately upon conclusion of the contract.

data.name: RetentionTitle
data.value: § 6 Retention of Title

data.name: RetentionTitle1
data.value: The goods remain our property until full payment is received.

data.name: RightWithdrawal
data.value: § 7 Right of withdrawal

data.name: RightWithdrawal1
data.value: (1) Consumers generally have a statutory right of withdrawal.

data.name: RightWithdrawal2
data.value: (2) However, the right of withdrawal is excluded pursuant to Section 312g Paragraph 2 No. 2 of the German Civil Code (BGB) for contracts for the supply of:

data.name: RightWithdrawal3
data.value: Foods that can spoil quickly or

data.name: RightWithdrawal4
data.value: Foodstuffs whose expiration date would be quickly exceeded,

data.name: RightWithdrawal5
data.value: Sealed food products that are not suitable for return for reasons of health protection or hygiene if the seal has been removed after delivery.

data.name: RightWithdrawal6
data.value: (3) Details can be found in our cancellation policy, which is available in the online shop.

data.name: Scope
data.value: § 1 Scope

data.name: Scope1
data.value: (1) These General Terms and Conditions (GTC) apply to all contracts for the delivery of goods to the delivery address specified by the customer, which are concluded between

data.name: Scope2
data.value: and are concluded with consumers within the meaning of Section 13 of the German Civil Code (BGB).

data.name: Scope3
data.value: (2) A consumer is any natural person who enters into a legal transaction for purposes that are predominantly neither attributable to their commercial nor their independent professional activity.

data.name: Scope4
data.value: (3) Any differing terms and conditions of the customer shall not apply unless we expressly agree to their validity.

data.name: SpecialFeaturesFoodstuffs
data.value: § 5 Special features of foodstuffs

data.name: SpecialFeaturesFoodstuffs1
data.value: (1) Our goods are food products and are subject to special hygiene and health requirements.

data.name: SpecialFeaturesFoodstuffs2
data.value: (2) The customer is obliged to inspect the delivered food products immediately upon receipt and to store them properly.

data.name: SpecialFeaturesFoodstuffs3
data.value: (3) The best before date (BBE) shown on the packaging does not constitute a guarantee date.

data.name: SpecialFeaturesFoodstuffs4
data.value: (4) Returns of opened, damaged or improperly stored food products are excluded.

data.name: TransportDamage
data.value: § 10 Transport damage

data.name: TransportDamage1
data.value: (1) The customer must immediately report any obvious transport damage to the delivery person and inform us.

data.name: TransportDamage2
data.value: (2) The statutory warranty rights remain unaffected.

data.name: Warranty
data.value: § 8 Warranty

data.name: Warranty1
data.value: (1) The statutory warranty rights apply.

data.name: Warranty2
data.value: (2) Defects resulting from improper storage, delayed acceptance or incorrect handling by the customer do not give rise to any warranty claims.
